body.title: Fix inference tests requiring real API keys or live network
body.result: dispatch() returns error InferenceResponse on no-source (no live call); google paid test skips when disabled
body.intention: I intend that inference tests pass without real API keys or live network calls.
body.description:
Two tests fail in CI environments without keys:
1. test_google_paid_registered — asserts google paid source is registered, but GOOGLE_API_KEY is not set in this env. Should skip or mock the key check.
2. test_dispatch_returns_error_response_on_no_source — makes a live OR HTTP call and gets 401. Should mock urllib.request.urlopen.

**Affected files:** tests/inference/test_google_source.py, tests/inference/test_inference_device.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Mock/skip the two env-dependent tests only. Do not change device code.
**Completion criteria:** Both tests pass (or skip cleanly) without GOOGLE_API_KEY or OPENROUTER_API_KEY set.
